title: Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
